a:r.a:t: HGV needs to align on the quick wins and long-term vision by balancing benefit, cost and time to execute
Design and standup compensation governance committees
Establish cross-functional RACI including clear decision & approval rights
Align planning calendars across all business units and sites
Design and stand-up a centralized Compensation Center of Excellence
Expand Varicent footprint to include Marketing & Telemarketing
Develop core data strategy to ensure clean, reliable, and secure comp system inputs
Roll out tool capabilities to include quota management & reporting
Harmonize & consolidate plans across sites and legacy businesses
Incorporate lead quality compensation measures into marketing plans
Increase total target compensation for Director+ roles to close market gap
Shift pay mix to have a higher fixed pay component
Enhance ramping policies to provide pay stability to new hires
Decide prioritization of Varicent roadmap: additional tool capabilities or expand to Marketing & Telemarketing
Expand Varicent’s managerial and leadership reporting capabilities
Increase weighting of contribution margin on Director+ plans
